issue_summary: add ctors create stored or not-stored variants of indexed fields
javadoc_before: /** A field that is indexed and tokenized, without term * vectors. For example this would be used on a 'body' * field, that contains the bulk of a document's text. * * This field's value is not stored by default; use the * {@link TextField#TYPE_STORED} type (pass it to new * Field) to store the value. */
